hero.sectionName: Royal Palace Christian Gujarati Wedding Hero
hero.html:
Kavya & Mihir

March 22, 2026

Akshar Grand Palace, Somerset, New Jersey

With blessings of Shri Ganesh and our families, we invite you to celebrate a joyful Gujarati wedding filled with mehendi, garba, baraat, sacred pheras, dinner, music, and love.
hero.css: .hero_001 { background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 223, 186, 0.8), rgba(255, 237, 211, 0.8)), url(''), center/cover no-repeat; height: 100vh; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; text-align: center; color: #4b2e83; position: relative; padding: 20px; } .hero_001-content { max-width: 800px; backdrop-filter: blur(10px); background-color: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.7); padding: 40px; border-radius: 15px; } .hero_001-title { font-family: 'Rozha One', serif; font-size: 3rem; margin-bottom: 20px; } .hero_001-date { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 10px; } .hero_001-venue { font-family: 'Cormorant Garamond', serif; font-size: 1.5rem; margin-bottom: 30px; } .hero_001-message { font-family: 'Noto Serif Gujarati', serif; font-size: 1.2rem; line-height: 1.8; } @media (max-width: 900px) { .hero_001-title { font-size: 2.5rem; } .hero_001-content { padding: 30px; } } @media (max-width: 640px) { .hero_001-title { font-size: 2rem; } .hero_001-date, .hero_001-venue { font-size: 1.2rem; } .hero_001-message { font-size: 1rem; } .hero_001-content { padding: 20px; } }
hero.designNotes: Created a romantic, royal palace theme using an elegant gradient background. Used a blend of English and Gujarati for cultural resonance. Incorporated a glass panel effect to make the text content stand out while maintaining a premium, modern vibe suited to a Gujarati Christian wedding.
